options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -allowNestedDefaultDomain
options.description: Allows a non-default power domain member to be logically nested in a default power domain

options.name: -checkAllNetsForDomainCrossing
options.description: {true|false} Checks all the nets for domain crossings

options.name: -handleBackToBackIsolation
options.description: Supports back-to-back isolation insertion along cross-domain net based on power intent ISO rule

options.name: -handlePD
options.description: To route intra-power domain nets only within their power domains

options.name: -handlePDComplex
options.description: to handle nets belong to multiple power domains

options.name: -honorCpfGlobalConnectionSpecForAoBuffer
options.description: {true|false} Honors connection specs for AO buffer based on the power intent rules

options.name: -honorCpfGlobalConnectionSpecForShifter
options.description: {true|false} Honors connection specs for shifters based on the CPF rules

options.name: -honorDotLibRelatedPGPin
options.description: Honors timing library related PG pins

options.name: -honorEffectiveDomainForIsoLsInsertion
options.description: {true|false} Honors effective domains for ISO/LS insertions

options.name: -markIsoEnablePinAsAlwaysOn
options.description: {true|false} To mark all Isolation cell's enable pin as always on

options.name: -notUseTopFTermDomainForVoltage
options.description: {true|false} Controls voltage using top fterm domain for IO pin voltage
